title: Mosale Mosale Lyrics Yennamo Yedho Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Mosale Mosale
Singers: Deepak, Pooja AV
Music: D Imman
Lyrics : Karky
Movie: Yennamo Yedho

Mosale Mosale en manasukulla
mulusa mulusa ne nulanjiputta
Mosale mosale en usurukulla
usuraa usuraa ne inanjipputta

Ulagamey ulagamey kulungudhey
un panju kaal pattu.
Osarathil osarathil kudhuikkudhey
en kaaalum manvittu.

Mosale Mosale en manasukulla
usuraa usuraa ne inanjipputta

Mudhugin pinna ne kannu vachu paarppa
munagum ivan nenjin aasa eppa ketpa
Keragatha moottum vaasam podhum
urakka nee pesa venaam yedhum
kaadellaam thee moolumey ye ye ye..

Mosale mosale en usurukulla
mulusa mulusa ne nulanjiputta

Medhuvaa medhuvaa naan
unna theendum munna.
Puyalaa puyalaa nee
enna thinna dhenna..

.. maasam kaanaa pogum
unna pola pulla nooru venum.
athaadi ammaadiyo..

Mosale Mosale en manasukulla
mulusa mulusa ne nulanjiputta
Mosale mosale en usurukulla
usuraa usuraa ne inanjipputta

Ulagamey ulagamey kulungudhey
un panju kaal pattu.
Osarathil osarathil kudhuikkudhey
en kaaalum manvittu.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Mosale Mosale'?

The song 'Mosale Mosale' conveys a playful and romantic vibe, expressing feelings of love and affection.

What is the plot context of the movie 'Ennamo Yedho'?

Ennamo Yedho revolves around themes of love and relationships, showcasing the ups and downs of romance.

Who are the singers and music director of this song?

The song features the talented singers AV Pooja and Deepak, with music composed by D Imman.

When was 'Mosale Mosale' released?

'Mosale Mosale' was released on January 19, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song 'Mosale Mosale' from the movie Ennamo Yedho, the playful lyrics and upbeat melody create a lively atmosphere that resonates with the joy of young love. The duet by AV Pooja and Deepak captures the essence of romance, making it a perfect fit for celebrations and special occasions. The song conveys a sense of happiness and excitement, inviting listeners to revel in the bliss of love. Overall, it serves as a delightful reminder of the carefree moments shared between lovers.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Mosale Mosale from the movie Ennamo Yedho is a vibrant duet that perfectly captures the essence of youthful romance. With the enchanting voices of AV Pooja and Deepak, paired with D Imman's catchy composition, this song is sure to uplift your spirits. Dive into the playful lyrics and infectious rhythm that make it a must-listen for any celebration!
stanzaMeanings: In my heart, you are deeply embedded. In my life, you are always present.
The world is swaying, your soft feet are dancing. In the rhythm, my heart is lost.
Now, both day and night are just like a carrot.
In my heart, you are always present.
After the end, you will see with your eyes, when he expresses his heart's desire. When you speak, don't say anything that will burn everything down.
In my life, you are deeply embedded.
I will search for you in the future. What will you eat, my dear?
Like the month that will pass, I need a hundred like you. That's how it is, my dear.
In my heart, you are deeply embedded. In my life, you are always present.
The world is swaying, your soft feet are dancing. In the rhythm, my heart is lost.
Now, both day and night are just like a carrot.
